auth.label: API Key
auth.description: API Ninjas API key used with the X-Api-Key header. Sign up for a key or find it from the official API docs: https://api-ninjas.com/api.

actions.name: air_quality
actions.description: Fetch current air quality metrics for coordinates or a city-based lookup.

lat.description: Latitude coordinate in decimal degrees between -90 and 90.

lon.description: Longitude coordinate in decimal degrees between -180 and 180.

city.description: City name used to look up the requested location.

state.description: State or province used to narrow the city-based lookup.

country.description: Country name or ISO country code used to narrow the city-based lookup.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for looking up air quality by coordinates or city.

overallAqi.description: Overall air quality index for the location.

aqi.description: Air quality index for the pollutant.

concentration.description: Pollutant concentration in micrograms per cubic meter.

aqi.description: Air quality index for the pollutant.

concentration.description: Pollutant concentration in micrograms per cubic meter.

aqi.description: Air quality index for the pollutant.

concentration.description: Pollutant concentration in micrograms per cubic meter.

aqi.description: Air quality index for the pollutant.

concentration.description: Pollutant concentration in micrograms per cubic meter.

aqi.description: Air quality index for the pollutant.

concentration.description: Pollutant concentration in micrograms per cubic meter.

aqi.description: Air quality index for the pollutant.

concentration.description: Pollutant concentration in micrograms per cubic meter.

outputSchema.description: Normalized air quality metrics returned by the air_quality action.

actions.name: geocode
actions.description: Convert a city name into geographic coordinates and country information.

city.description: City name to convert into geographic coordinates.

state.description: State or province used to narrow the city-based lookup.

country.description: Country name or ISO country code used to narrow the city-based lookup.

zipcode.description: ZIP or postal code used to narrow the geocoding lookup.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for converting a named location into coordinates.

name.description: Resolved location name returned by the geocoding lookup.

latitude.description: Latitude of the resolved location in decimal degrees.

longitude.description: Longitude of the resolved location in decimal degrees.

country.description: Country code of the resolved location.

results.description: Resolved geocoding matches for the input.

outputSchema.description: Resolved coordinates returned by the geocode action.

actions.name: reverse_geocode
actions.description: Resolve latitude and longitude coordinates into place metadata.

lat.description: Latitude coordinate in decimal degrees between -90 and 90.

lon.description: Longitude coordinate in decimal degrees between -180 and 180.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for resolving coordinates into location metadata.

name.description: Resolved place name for the provided coordinates.

country.description: Country code of the resolved place.

state.description: State or administrative region of the resolved place.

results.description: Resolved places matching the provided coordinates.

outputSchema.description: Resolved location metadata returned by the reverse geocode action.

actions.name: timezone
actions.description: Fetch timezone metadata by timezone name or premium location lookup fields.

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier used by the free-tier lookup path.

lat.description: Latitude coordinate in decimal degrees between -90 and 90.

lon.description: Longitude coordinate in decimal degrees between -180 and 180.

city.description: City name used to look up the requested location.

state.description: State or province used to narrow the city-based lookup.

country.description: Country name or ISO country code used to narrow the city-based lookup.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for looking up timezone details.

utcOffset.description: UTC offset in seconds for the resolved timezone.

localTime.description: Current local time in ISO 8601 format.

outputSchema.description: Normalized timezone data returned by the timezone action.

actions.name: weather
actions.description: Fetch the current weather conditions for a set of coordinates.

lat.description: Latitude coordinate in decimal degrees between -90 and 90.

lon.description: Longitude coordinate in decimal degrees between -180 and 180.

inputSchema.description: Coordinate input accepted by weather endpoints.

windSpeed.description: Wind speed in meters per second.

sunrise.description: Sunrise time as a Unix timestamp in seconds.

sunset.description: Sunset time as a Unix timestamp in seconds.

outputSchema.description: Normalized weather metrics for a single reading.

actions.name: weather_forecast
actions.description: Fetch forecast weather readings for a set of coordinates.

lat.description: Latitude coordinate in decimal degrees between -90 and 90.

lon.description: Longitude coordinate in decimal degrees between -180 and 180.

inputSchema.description: Coordinate input accepted by weather endpoints.

windSpeed.description: Wind speed in meters per second.

sunrise.description: Sunrise time as a Unix timestamp in seconds.

sunset.description: Sunset time as a Unix timestamp in seconds.

items.description: Normalized weather metrics for a single reading.

forecast.description: Forecast readings returned in chronological order.

outputSchema.description: Forecast weather data returned by the weather_forecast action.
